title: Pour Out
html: Intro: D A/C# Bm7 G (2x) D A/C# I wanna pour out my all to you Bm7 G I empty myself of all my religious ways D A/C# I wanna pour out my all to you Bm7 G D I leave behind my need for recognition A/C# Bm7 Asus4 A And everything that keeps me from you, Jesus D A/C# I wanna pour out my all to you Bm7 G D I wanna let go of my desappointment D A/C# I wanna pour out my all to you Bm7 G D To be released from the prison of the past A/C# Bm7 Asus4 A And everything that keeps me from you, Jesus D A/C# Where i can go, oh Lord? Em7 Asus4 A For only you have the words of eternal life D A/C# Where can i hide, oh Lord? Em7 You are the air that i breathe Bm7 Asus4 A Your presence captured my heart D A/C# Flood me wiht your love Bm7 A/C# Transform me with you love G Em7 Asus4 A Draw my heart to you, oh Lord D A/C# Move me with your love Bm7 A/C# And use me for you praise alone G Em7 Asus4 A Teach me how to hear your heart, oh God SOLO : Bm7 G9 Em7 Asus4 A ESPONTÂNEO : Bm7 A/C# G9 Asus4 A
